title: crotalaria anthyllopsis
intro: Crotalaria anthyllopsis, also known as bush calabar bean, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria anthyllopsis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and leaves are often dried and used to make teas or infusions, as well as being used in traditional remedies to treat a range of health issues.
